HomePage.heroSubtitle: Discover the best properties that fit your needs.
HomePage.searchPlaceholder: Enter a Location (e.g., Cordoba, Carlos Paz, etc)
HomePage.historiaText:
Field subdivision located in a mountain area, with access through Yacanto and El Durazno, approximately 6 km from the latter.

The property combines nature, privacy, and ideal conditions to develop a home, rest house, or mountain refuge. The lots are suitable for housing or construction, have spring water, and mostly feature direct stream frontage.

The field has perimeter fencing, stone walls (pircas), internal access roads to each sector, varied and old forestation, plus a permanent caretaker for security and maintenance.

A proposal for those looking to invest in land with natural value, in an environment of tranquility, water, and mountain landscape.

Perfect titles for immediate deed.

Hero.subtitle1: Spring water, stream frontage, and varied old forestation

TrustStrip.item1Text: All lots are suitable for building a home or rest house.
TrustStrip.item2Text: Documentary security to move forward with total peace of mind.
TrustStrip.item3Text: Documentation ready to complete the transaction.

Pillars.sectionText: More than a subdivision, it's an opportunity to connect with nature with complete security.
Pillars.item1Text: Mountain fields, springs, old trees, and an unparalleled landscape.
Pillars.item2Text: Lots in a natural environment, with controlled access, caretaker, and permanent maintenance.
Pillars.item3Text: Spring water and stream frontage on all lots.
Pillars.item4Text: 40 minutes from Santa Rosa de Calamuchita and 2 hours from Cordoba Capital.
Pillars.item5Text: Perfect titles and ready for immediate deed.
